project.name: Shepherd Text Coaching Agent
project.description: AI-powered text coaching agent for Denver Griffin's Divorce Stoppers program. Uses persistent memory, screenshot analysis, and Denver's coaching methodology.

phases.name: Webinar CTA Platform
phases.notes: Research complete: video.js overlays, $25/mo vs $299/mo. CTA at 81 min hits 25% → 45 min doubles audience.

phases.name: MPMC Scale (450 Coaches)
phases.notes: If Shepherd works for Denver → template it for 450 coaches at low marginal cost.

contradictions.label: Revenue vs Affordability
contradictions.detail: Claims $700-800K/month peak but can't afford $2,500. Treat $100K/month as ceiling.

contradictions.label: Solo + Queue Paradox
contradictions.detail: Running 40-50 clients alone with 4,500 in queue. Bandwidth collapse is the real pain.

contradictions.label: Scope vs Payment
contradictions.detail: $2K buys a taste, not a meal. Written deliverables needed.

contradictions.label: Previous AI Failed
contradictions.detail: Almost perfect agent broke ~4 months ago. Likely prompt drift.

calls.title: At Bitler's house — Denver review
calls.summary: In-person meeting with Denver Griffin at Bitler's house. Denver agreed to $2K retainer for text coaching AI agent. He had an 'almost perfect' AI that broke 4 months ago. Solo operator with zero employees. Wants to own all infrastructure. MPMC vision: clone coaching brains into 1,000 AI businesses.
decisions: Text message coaching AI agent as first deliverable
Denver provides program access, transcripts, David's roadmap
Performance-based pricing proposed for ongoing engagement

discoveries: Denver had 'almost perfect' text coaching agent — screenshot analysis, coached response, revised message
Previous AI used Claude, two-tiered memory system — broke when David tweaked it
Zero employees — fired 16-person team including David
400-500 MPMC coach applications — scale play if text agent works
Denver records everything — years of transcripts as training data
Wants 3-4 redundant backup locations, data sovereignty non-negotiable
ManyChat as stopgap — knows it's not AI
